preamble: The transformation of the nasalized close front vowel [ĩ] into the diphthong [ei] involves a lowering of the main vowel quality and diphthongization.

examples.note: Nasal vowels in Portuguese can break into diphthongs with a lower starting point.

sources: Ladefoged, P., & Maddieson, I. (1996). The Sounds of the World's Languages.
